title: Policy Gradient Methods Path
description: Build fluency in Policy Gradient Methods inside Reinforcement Learning by moving from foundational terms into adjacent methods, variants, and extensions.

steps.title: Deep Deterministic Policy Gradient (DDPG)
steps.summary: A model-free, off-policy reinforcement learning algorithm. It sits inside Reinforcement Learning / Policy Gradient Methods. Start after DDPG and Deterministic Policy. It opens into Deep Deterministic Policy Gradient (DDPG) Variants and Deep Deterministic Policy Gradient (DDPG) Variants Extensions.
steps.whyIncluded: Start here to anchor the vocabulary and core intuition for this area.

steps.title: Deep Deterministic Policy Gradients (DDPG)

steps.whyIncluded: Start here to anchor the vocabulary and core intuition for this area.

steps.title: DDPG

It opens into Deep Deterministic Policy Gradient (DDPG) and Deep Deterministic Policy Gradients (DDPG).

steps.title: Ghost Gradients
steps.summary: Ghost Gradients belongs to the Reinforcement Learning area of AI/ML, within Policy Gradient Methods. It sits inside Reinforcement Learning / Policy Gradient Methods. Compare it with Second-Order Gradients and Deep Deterministic Policy Gradients (DDPG).
